titleStmt.title: SII 9.374: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 374. (A.R. No. 519 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT CHIMNAHALLI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 6th year of the reign of the Yādava king Vīra-Mahādēva, cyclic year Krōdhana, Ashādha, ba. amāvāse, [Sō]mavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1265 July 13 Monday; f.d.t. • 33. It records that Sōyidēvarasa made a gift of the village Nelkudure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁThis is engraved in continuation of No 88.
bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpacakravartti śrīvīramahadēvarā
jyōdayadalli 6 neya saṁvatsārada sukasaṁkatāvinavada
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatupādapadumōpajīvi svasti
śrīmaṁnnu mahāsabaḷa paṁcāḷa miṇḍiyaverggaḍe daṁḍa
dōvari baṁdu niccaṁdācāmulanumappa śrīma
tusōyidēvarsaraṁ taṁma vaḷitagrāma nelkudure krōdhana
saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa bahuḷa Amāvāśe sōmavārada mu
harttadali śrīmaduradēvarayācāryyarājaguru da
kṣiṇedhārāpūrvvakavāgi biṭṭa datti māriseṭṭimukhya
Eṁṭuhiṭuṁ dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisu
varu maṁgaḷaṁ mahāśrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.374 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
